close_reason: Review complete. 17/21 findings fixed and pushed. 3 remain flagged for human decision (.5 type splitting, .8 DER encoder, .18 naming convention).
description: Code review of secretx-tpm2/src/lib.rs: correctness and API-contract findings
notes:
Review confidence: 25% chance of missed bug.
Least confident areas: (1) NV partial-write behavior (.1) — need to verify against real TPM whether nv_write at offset 0 with shorter data leaves stale tail bytes or if the NV index size is exactly the write size; (2) picky-asn1-der SPKI encoding (.8) — haven't verified the DER output against a reference.
Would raise confidence if: integration test against swtpm simulator exercising put(short)+get() round-trip, and a golden-vector test for public_key_der() output.
title: Review secretx-tpm2 lib.rs
